message:
fix(browser): P3 SQL correctness fixes - window funcs, null handling

- Fix NTILE overflow when N > partition size (use SQL standard algo)
- Add ORDER BY column validation warning for missing columns
- Fix NTH_VALUE to use frame bounds instead of partition length
- Add BETWEEN null handling (SQL NULL semantics)
- Add frame bounds type coercion to prevent NaN
- Add SUBSTRING bounds validation for null/invalid args
- Filter NaN values in window aggregate functions
